mapper.sql: id, knowledge_base_id, parent_id, name, description, path, level, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select:
select
from knowledge_directory where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select count(1) from knowledge_directory where deleted = 0 and parent_id = #{parentId}
select count(1) from knowledge_directory where deleted = 0 and knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId}
mapper.update: update knowledge_directory set knowledge_base_id = #{directory.knowledgeBaseId}, parent_id = #{directory.parentId}, name = #{directory.name}, description = #{directory.description}, path = #{directory.path}, level = #{directory.level}, sort_order = #{directory.sortOrder} where id = #{directory.id} and deleted = 0
update knowledge_directory set deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
